title: VxRail vSAN Disk Group Decommission and Evacuation Events
app: Custom modular input from VxRail Manager `/rest/vxm/v1/system` and vSAN health exports; align with VMware TA patterns
spl:
index=vxrail sourcetype="vxrail:vsan" earliest=-24h
| eval op=lower(coalesce(operation, op))
| where match(op, "(?i)decom|remove|evac")
| eval st=lower(status)
| where st!="success" OR tonumber(bytes_to_resync)>0
| stats latest(bytes_to_resync) as pending_bytes by cluster_id, disk_group_uuid
description: Disk group removals trigger large resync traffic. Monitoring decommission status prevents accidental removal during production peaks and validates evacuation completeness.
value: Avoids data unavailability during hardware swaps and confirms cluster resilience.
implementation: Poll vSAN tasks after each maintenance. Alert on non-success or growing resync bytes. Correlate with `vxrail:physical_disk` SMART events.
visualization: Timeline decommission; gauge resync bytes; table disk groups.
grandmaExplanation: We keep an eye on vxRail vSAN Disk Group Decommission and Evacuation Events and raise the alarm before it drags down real work or real outages start.
knownFalsePositives: IGEL and endpoint UMS health can warn during bulk firmware, certificate rotation, or when a single site loses WAN; use device cohorts to separate local noise from UMS issues.
